title: GlobalField
description: A reusable global field definition that can be embedded in content types.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the global field.

title.description: Display name of the global field.

schema.description: Array of field definitions within the global field group.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the global field was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the global field was last updated.
